metadata.author: Ejentum
metadata.description: Library of 679 cognitive operations engineered in natural language across four harnesses (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory). Each harness call retrieves a task-matched scaffold the agent ingests before responding. Exposed to AutoGen Studio as a single McpWorkbench wrapping the ejentum-mcp stdio MCP server.

workbenches.description: Ejentum cognitive harness via MCP. The agent can call harness_reasoning, harness_code, harness_anti_deception, or harness_memory; each call retrieves a task-matched scaffold from a library of 679 cognitive operations engineered in natural language. Requires EJENTUM_API_KEY (free tier 100 calls, no card, at https://ejentum.com/pricing).
workbenches.label: Ejentum Reasoning Harness
